---
title: ""
---

Welcome to Haruki Yagi's homepage.

- I am a second-year master student in [Gong group](https://sites.google.com/g.ecc.u-tokyo.ac.jp/gonggroup/).
- My current research interests lie broadly in condensed matter theory and quantum information, approached from a quantum field theory perspective.
- For information about physics, please see [this page](Physics.qmd).
- If you would like to know about me, please see [this page](about.qmd).
- Contact: yagi-haruki819 at g.ecc.u-tokyo.ac.jp (replace at with "＠".)
